title: Board name for item name
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like that when an item is created, it is named with the name of the board automatically 
thank you 
Jean

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like that when an item is created, it is named with the name of the board automatically

thank you
Jean

posts.author: Chrism99 (Chris Medina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Jean ,

Assuming you’re using an automation to create items, all you have to do is edit the name of the items that are being created. You can edit your automation, click the item and you can edit the name to what ever you want.

posts.author: daniel.cubicup (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: It works for only one board, but if I want to do the same from a lot of boards I must do it in each board. ¿there is a way to cope the name of the board automatically?

posts.author: elizabeth.jaeger (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this feature, too, but I wish it would source the board name automatically instead of requiring to manually type the board. I have a need for ~ 50 boards a year that trigger an automation to create a new item in another board and want it to be named after the original board. I don’t want to have to create 50 automations by scratch each time and wish it could just push the board name so I can make that board a template for all other use cases.
